hero.subtitle: The only specialized state organization in Kazakhstan for aerial detection and extinguishing of forest fires. Operating since 1978.
hero.badge: hectares of forests under protection in Kazakhstan

stats.year: Year of founding aerial forest protection

aboutSection.title: Kazakhstan's Unique Forest Protection Service
aboutSection.p1: RSPE «Kazavialesookhrana» is the only state enterprise in the Republic of Kazakhstan with decades of experience in detecting and extinguishing forest and landscape fires.
aboutSection.p2: Flight crew specialists have higher forestry education, trained at leading centers in Russia and Europe.

services.title: What We Do
services.s1_desc: Timely aerial detection and rapid suppression of forest and landscape fires across Kazakhstan
services.s2_desc: Protection of forests and specially protected natural areas from fires and violations of forest legislation
services.s3_desc: Performing flights for forestry and hunting needs, patrolling protected territories
services.s4_desc: Biodiversity conservation and combating violations in wildlife protection and reproduction
services.s5_desc: Conducting forest pathology monitoring and tracking the condition of the republic's forest fund
services.s6_desc: Awareness and educational work among the population in the field of forest protection

footer.desc: The only state enterprise in the Republic of Kazakhstan for aerial forest protection. Almaty, Abay St. 32/2

newsPage.title: News
newsPage.subtitle: Current events, raids, trainings and achievements of RSPE «Kazavialesookhrana»

vacanciesPage.title: Vacancies
vacanciesPage.subtitle: Open positions at RSPE «Kazavialesookhrana» — join the team of Kazakhstan's forest protectors
vacanciesPage.whyDesc: Kazavialesookhrana is a state organization with a rich history. We have been protecting Kazakhstan's nature since 1978.
vacanciesPage.benefit3: Meaningful mission — protecting the country's nature
